messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0027",
  "title": "核心战斗与玩法体验",
  "page_index": 16,
  "page_range": "16"
}

Section text:
核心战斗与玩法体验

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "核心战斗与玩法体验" (Core Combat and Gameplay Experience) on page 16. It contains no substantive text, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Consequently, it can only answer high-level structural or navigational questions, such as whether the document addresses core combat and gameplay experience, or where that topic is introduced. It cannot answer detailed questions regarding specific mechanics, design claims, quantitative data, or procedural steps due to the complete absence of supporting content.
